sections.paragraph:
- Original: Γαβριήλ

- Transliteration: Gabriel

- Phonetic: gab-ree-ale'

- Definition: Gabriel = "man of God"

1. one of the angel princes or chiefs of the angels

- Origin: of hebrew origin H1403

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: Of hebrew origin [H1403]; Gabriel an archangel: - Gabriel.
